# Upstream release tags already triaged/resolved for monitor suppression.
#
# Accepted entries (one per line):
#   1) <tag>                    e.g. v1.2.3
#   2) <owner>/<repo>@<tag>     e.g. vvb2060/CallRecording@v1.2.3
#
# Rules:
# - Exact match only.
# - Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
# - Inline comments are allowed after #.
# - Malformed lines are ignored safely.
#
# Maintenance:
# - Add a line when triage is done and no further issue is needed for that tag.
# - Remove a line to re-enable issue tracking for that tag.
